# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy
  - notify

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

before_script:
  - echo "Starting deployment process"
  - |
    if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
      echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    fi

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Deploying feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "Commit message: Deploying $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "Release notes: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
      else
        echo "Deploying commit: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-app.com

notification_job:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Sending notification for MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "Tagging with: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      else
        echo "Sending notification for commit: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  after_script:
    - echo "Notification sent successfully"

release_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Creating release for: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "Release notes: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        git tag -a "feature-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" -m "Deployed $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      else
        echo "Creating release for commit: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE"
        git tag -a "commit-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" -m "Deployed $CI_COMMIT_TITLE"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-app.com
